docs.title: Webley
docs.text:
class Webley:
    router: Router

The main application object in the Webley framework. Handles routing and the running of a web server.

docs.title: router               :  Router
docs.text: The router instance responsible for storing all route handlers. Used internally by the Webley framework to match incoming requests.

docs.title: HttpRequest
docs.text:
class HttpRequest:
    method: str
    path: str

Represents an HTTP request in Webley. Contains all the metadata and body of the incoming HTTP request.

docs.title: method  : str
docs.text: The HTTP method of the request (e.g., GET, POST).

docs.title: path  : str
docs.text: The path part of the requested URL.

docs.title: HttpResponse
docs.text:
class HttpResponse:
    status_code: int
    headers: dict[str, str]
    content: bytes

Represents an HTTP response in Webley. Contains status, headers, and body of the response.

docs.title: headers  : dict[str, str]
docs.text: Key-value map of headers to include in the response.
